title: thesium divaricatum var. humifusum
intro: Thesium divaricatum var. humifusum, also known as a species of the genus Thesium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Santalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thesium divaricatum var. humifusum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thesium divaricatum var. humifusum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
